reference: Hi, I am the mother of a ten-month-old baby boy. I wish to know if I can give fruit juices to my baby, and if so, which fruit juices I need to give. I heard that during winter, I should not give fruits or fruit juices as they cause colds and coughs. Could you please suggest if I can give either fruits or fruit juices, and if so, which would be the best option?
text: Hi, I am the mother of a 10-month-old baby boy. I wish to know if I can give fruit juices to my baby, and if so, which fruit juices I need to give. I heard that during winter I should not give fruits or fruit juices as they cause colds and coughs. Could you please suggest if I can give either fruits or fruit juices, and if so, which would be the best option?
